description: An author opens the create-plan flow at one of three entry routes — "I have a problem", "I have an outcome in mind", or "Formalize a proposal" — and provides their seed input. From that seed, the LLM uses ALL data from the school's DB as its universe of context to render a draft plan with every element populated. The author then evaluates and fine-tunes the rendered draft.
